scripts.dev:legacy: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.test:backend: npm run check:tracked-paths && npm run check:destructive-guards && npm run check:risk-guardrails && npm run check:vercel-rewrites && npm run sync:erp-access && npm --prefix backend test
scripts.test:frontend: npm run check:tracked-paths && npm run check:destructive-guards && npm run check:risk-guardrails && npm run check:vercel-rewrites && npm run sync:erp-access && npm --prefix frontend test
scripts.build:backend: npm run sync:erp-access && cd backend && npm install --omit=dev
scripts.build:frontend: npm run sync:erp-access && cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && npm run check:frontend-bundle
scripts.deploy:railway: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && echo '✓ All tests passed. Ready for Railway deployment.'
